daily_email_check.name: Daily email triage
daily_email_check.instruction: Check inbox, summarise unread emails, extract tasks, flag urgent items. Draft replies for approval.

weekly_cashflow.name: Weekly cashflow report
weekly_cashflow.instruction: Generate weekly cashflow report from Brain Index. Summarise bills, upcoming renewals, overdue invoices.

weekly_slack_digest.name: Weekly Slack digest
weekly_slack_digest.instruction: Summarise all Slack messages from the past week. Extract key decisions, action items, and pending replies.

daily_renewal_check.name: Daily renewal radar
daily_renewal_check.instruction: Check Brain Index for renewals due in next 30 days. Alert if anything needs attention.

watch_bills_folder.name: Auto-ingest bills folder
watch_bills_folder.instruction: New file detected in bills folder. Process with Vision Pipeline and add to Brain Index.

monthly_supplier_analysis.name: Monthly supplier analysis
monthly_supplier_analysis.instruction: Run full supplier analysis. Cluster by spend, identify renegotiation targets, flag price changes.

folder_organiser.name: Auto-organise downloads
folder_organiser.instruction: Sort Downloads folder: move PDFs to docs/, images to assets/, rename by date. Report changes.
